english translation text: ZAHRA JAIYAN DA AASRA GHAZI THE ONLY HOPE FOR ZAHRA’S DAUGHTERS IS GHAZI (HAZRAT ABBAS a.s.)English Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
ZAHRA JAIYAN DA AASRA GHAZI,HOYA KARBAL, DHE VICH JUDA GHAZI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THE ONLY HOPE FOR ZAHRA’S DAUGHTERS IS GHAZI (HAZRAT ABBAS a.s.),
IN KERBALA THEY WERE SEPARATED FROM GHAZI

urdu transliteration text:
KEEWE JAAWANGI SHAAM TE KUFAMEKU MAHMAL TE AH BAHA GHAZI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
HOW WILL I MAKE MY WAY TO SHAAM & KUFA,
OH COME AND HELP ME SIT ON THE SADDLE O’GHAZI
OH COME AND BAIL ME OUT OF THIS PRISON O’GHAZI

urdu transliteration text:
SIR TU ZAINAB DE LEH GAYI CHADARJADUN MAQTAL NU TUR PAYA GHAZI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
THEY TOOK VEIL OF ZAINAB FROM HER HEAD,
THE MOMENT YOU LEFT FOR THE BATTLEFIELD O’GHAZI

urdu transliteration text:
MERI CHADAR KHUDA DA PARDA EHMERI CHADAR DI TU BAQA GHAZI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
MY VEIL IS THE CLOAK OF ALLAH,
YOU O’GHAZI ARE THE PRESTIGE OF MY VEIL

urdu transliteration text:
CHEH JAGA TOUN HUSSAIN CHUNEYA HAIFIR VI PURA NA MIL SAKA GHAZI
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
HUSSAIN TRIED TO GATHER YOUR SHATTERED PIECES FROM DIFFERENT PLACES,
HE WAS NOT ABLE TO FIND ALL THE PIECES OF YOUR BODY O’GHAZI
AS HE KNEW YOU AREN’T THERE TO SAVE HIM O’GHAZI
